zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Meade VI於1510年之後出生在英國艾可艾爾姆頓時，他的父親Thomas Meade V8510歲，母親Joan Wycliffe8501歲。他於大約1534年與Joan Wycliff在英國英格蘭艾可貝爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1585年5月26日在英國艾可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Meade VI于1510年之后出生在英国艾可艾爾姆頓时，他的父亲Thomas Meade V8510岁，母亲Joan Wycliffe8501岁。他于大约1534年与Joan Wycliff在英国英格兰艾可貝爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1585年5月26日在英国艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Meade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: habitational name from Midheach, the Gaelic name of County Meath in Ireland. Its Anglicized forms are now indistinguishable from those of the English name Mead .

variants.name: Mead
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a meadow, from Middle English mede ‘meadow’ (Old English mǣd), or a habitational name from one or more of the many places so named, such as Meads in Harford (Devon).
perhaps from Middle English mede ‘mead, alcoholic drink of fermented honey and water’, possibly denoting one who was fond of the drink or who made or sold mead. Compare Meader .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Meade VI was born after 1510, in Elmdon, Essex, England, his father, Thomas Meade V, was 8510 and his mother, Joan Wycliffe, was 8501. He married Joan Wycliff about 1534, in Berden, Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 26 May 1585, in Essex, England.

Il a épousé Joan Wycliff environ 1534, à Berden, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 26 mai 1585, à Essex, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Meade VIが1510年以後にイギリスエセックスエルムドンで生まれた時，父Thomas Meade Vは8510歳，母Joan Wycliffeは8501歳であった。約1534年にイギリスイギリスエセックスバーデンでJoan Wycliffと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1585年5月26日にイギリスエセックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Meade VI(이)가 1510년 이후 영국 에세스 엘던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Meade V(은)는 8510세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Wycliffe(은)는 8501세였다. 그는 대략 1534년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 버든에서 Joan Wycliff(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1585년 5월 26일 영국 에세스에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Meade VI родился после 1510 г. в местности элмдон, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Meade V было 8510 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Wycliffe, 8501. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Wycliff около 1534 г. в местности бирден, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 26 мая 1585 г. в местности эссекс, Англия.
